campaign.title: Abu Dhabi Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure
campaign.pitch_message:
Hi WMW team

We are opening a limited number of confidential conversations around an Abu Dhabi digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with strong structural power economics at $0.0125/kWh. The opportunity is infrastructure-led, execution-ready, and intended for a serious private-capital audience. Would you be open to a brief introduction?

Regards Jonas Freiwald

prioritized_outreach_order.name: Tier 1 - Sovereign Wealth Funds
prioritized_outreach_order.rationale: Largest capital pools, infrastructure mandates, active infrastructure investors

investors.name: Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA)
investors.contact_approach: Email via contact form + direct institutional investor relations
investors.notes: Most appropriate: Infrastructure team or Business Development

investors.name: Mubadala Investment Company
investors.contact_approach: Visit mubadala.com/en/contact-us for specific infrastructure inquiries
investors.notes: Most active SWF globally - Best fit. Ask for infrastructure/digital infrastructure team

investors.name: Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF)
investors.address: Information Technology Complex, Building CS01, Al Nakhil District, PO Box 6847, Riyadh 11452
investors.contact_approach: Email with formal introduction + mention HUMAIN AI infrastructure focus
investors.notes: $36.2B deployed in 2025 - World's most active SWF. High priority.

investors.name: Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA)
investors.infrastructure_contact: ahmadbdr@kia.gov.kw (Ahmad Al-Bader, Director - Real Estate & Infrastructure)
investors.address: Block 1, Street 201, Building 900028, Sharq, P.O. Box 64, Safat, 13001 Kuwait City
investors.contact_approach: Email directly to infrastructure director with focus on power economics
investors.notes: Recently joined $30B Microsoft AI Infrastructure Partnership - Very active in infrastructure

prioritized_outreach_order.name: Tier 2 - Infrastructure-Focused Funds

investors.notes: Major data center investor with GCC operations. Perfect alignment.

investors.name: Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP)

email_template.subject_line: Confidential Investment Opportunity - Abu Dhabi Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure
email_template.body:
Hi [INVESTOR_NAME_TEAM],

We are opening a limited number of confidential conversations around an Abu Dhabi digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with strong structural power economics at $0.0125/kWh. The opportunity is infrastructure-led, execution-ready, and intended for a serious private-capital audience.

Given [INVESTOR_NAME]'s focus on [SPECIFIC_FOCUS: infrastructure/digital infrastructure/energy/AI], we believe this could be of strategic interest.

Would you be open to a brief introduction?

Regards,
Jonas Freiwald
jonas@poool.com
Poool
+971 XX XXX XXXX
customization_tips: Mention their specific focus areas (AI, energy, digital infrastructure)
For SWFs, emphasize infrastructure mandate alignment
For crypto investors, emphasize Bitcoin mining economics
